name: onedrive
description: Manage OneDrive files from Codex through Microsoft Graph with device-code login and Keychain token storage.

interface.shortDescription: Search, read, upload, and safely manage OneDrive files.
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to your Microsoft OneDrive through Microsoft Graph. The plugin supports device-code authentication, Keychain-backed refresh token storage, file listing, search, delta sync, permission audits, path presets, document downloads, uploads, text writes, folder creation, rename, move, copy, dry-run sharing links, dry-run restore, and dry-run delete defaults. It works with personal OneDrive and Microsoft 365 OneDrive accounts when your Microsoft app registration has delegated Graph file permissions.
